title: AC-DISTILL-OPT-IN and AC-DISTILL-CONTENT-REVIEW negative-path acceptance test
goal: Negative-path acceptance test that proves the four AC-DISTILL-* acceptance criteria reject prohibited paths: (a) AC-DISTILL-OPT-IN: distillation default OFF and opt-in does not extend transitively across sessions; (b) AC-DISTILL-CONTENT-REVIEW: PII-bearing fragments are blocked, license-untaggable fragments quarantined, near-dup candidates deduplicated; (c) AC-DISTILL-EDITABLE-SURFACE: an attempt to register a forbidden editable surface (spec text, role-shared system prompt, LoRA weight, tool description) fails with typed error; (d) AC-DISTILL-LOOP-SAFEGUARDS: holdout encryption + multi-metric promotion floor + Goodhart sentinel + HBR-SWARM-002 cap all reject their respective bad inputs.
expected_diff_shape: New integration test src/backend/handshake_core/tests/ac_distill_negative_path_tests.rs. Adds tests/fixtures/ac_distill_negative_path/ with PII fixture, license-untaggable fixture, near-dup fixture pair, forbidden-surface fixture.
unblock_conditions: D.2 + D.3 chain MTs land (specifically the safeguard MTs).
implementation_notes: Each AC gets a sub-test: (a) AC-DISTILL-OPT-IN: invoke SpawnTreeHarvester (MT-166) with opt_in_confirmed=false, assert HarvestError::OptInRequired; invoke harvester on session A with opt-in=true and assert it does NOT recurse into session B (spawned by A) unless B is independently opted in. (b) AC-DISTILL-CONTENT-REVIEW: feed PII fixture (sample with email + phone) through ContentReviewer (assume cluster C reviewer trait), assert FR-EVT-DISTILL-PII-DETECT emitted and candidate blocked; feed license-untaggable fragment, assert quarantine record created; feed near-dup pair, assert second item deduplicated (returns existing candidate id). (c) AC-DISTILL-EDITABLE-SURFACE: construct synthetic LoopTarget with a SpecText variant (must NOT exist in the closed enum - this is a compile-time assertion that the enum is closed; runtime assertion via attempt to register a custom EditableSurfaceProvider for spec text fails with EditableSurfaceError::Forbidden); construct a LoopTarget for RetrievalPolicy with top_k=0 (out of bounds), assert RetrievalPolicySurface::snapshot returns typed error. (d) AC-DISTILL-LOOP-SAFEGUARDS: attempt to decrypt holdout without key, assert CorpusError; submit baseline+trial EvalResult where dev_pass equal (no improvement), assert MultiMetricPromotionFloor returns Rejected with FloorReason::DevPassRateNotImproved; submit 3 consecutive widening-gap iterations, assert GoodhartSentinel returns Pause; submit 26th scheduling request in 24h window, assert LoopScheduler returns Skip BudgetExhausted with FR-EVT-DISTILL-LOOP-CAP emitted.
risk_if_missed: Without negative-path coverage the safeguards may compile and pass happy-path tests but silently allow bypass; AC-DISTILL-* acceptance is not provably enforced.
validator_focus: Each AC has explicit negative test. Compile-time enum closedness is asserted. Runtime typed errors enumerated.

builder_handoff_correction_20260525.operator_instruction: Operator clarified that completed/pass-like states were not validator-reviewed and instructed Kernel Builder to mark everything ready for validator handoff except the blocked item.
builder_handoff_correction_20260525.current_interpretation: Kernel Builder implementation handoff readiness only; no WP/Integration Validator pass or validator-reviewed completion is claimed.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Kernel Builder believes implementation/supporting evidence is ready for Integration Validator handoff; validator review remains pending.

minimum_controls: Every AC-DISTILL-* ID has an explicit negative test that asserts the typed rejection.
Opt-in non-transitivity tested by spawn-tree A->B fixture with only A opted in.
Forbidden surface enforcement asserted both at compile time (closed enum) and runtime (typed error).

implementation_evidence.summary: MT-169 added the AC-DISTILL negative-path acceptance test target plus follow-on Flight Recorder PII hardening: sanitized FR-EVT-DISTILL-PII-DETECT event construction/recording through the FlightRecorder trait, registry/schema coverage, PEFT corpus review event exposure, TrainingTurn fixture deserialization, and fail-closed retrieval-policy snapshot validation for invalid stored values.

sources_checked: Temporal Workflow Definition determinism and replay constraints: https://docs.temporal.io/workflow-definition#deterministic-constraints
LangSmith dataset versioning and trace-to-dataset evaluation docs: https://docs.langchain.com/langsmith/manage-datasets
OpenTelemetry GenAI semantic conventions for observable AI traces: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/gen-ai/
OpenTelemetry general event naming and attribute guidance: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/general/events/
OWASP Logging Cheat Sheet data-to-exclude guidance for sanitizing sensitive data while preserving audit context: https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/Logging_Cheat_Sheet.html
Hugging Face dataset cards / dataset governance reference: https://huggingface.co/docs/hub/datasets-cards
Local field implementations from MT-149, MT-152, MT-153, MT-156, MT-158, MT-163, and MT-166 module/test surfaces
relevant_patterns_found: Distillation and trace-to-dataset flows need explicit opt-in gates, provenance, content review, and review-gated candidate promotion.
Negative-path acceptance should assert typed failures and durable sanitized Flight Recorder events, not only absence of successful output.
Loop safeguards should fail closed at the boundary where an invalid input is first observed.
reuse_opportunities: Reused SpawnTreeHarvester for opt-in default-off and non-transitive session checks.
Reused ContentReview, TrainingTurn fixtures, quarantine/dedup verdicts, FlightRecorder trait recording, FR registry validators, and PEFT corpus review flow for content review negative paths.
Reused ModelManualSurface, RetrievalPolicySurface, HbrTestPacketCorpus, MultiMetricPromotionFloor, GoodhartSentinel, and LoopScheduler for editable-surface and loop-safeguard checks.
rejected_options: Rejected a stub-only negative-path test because the contract is acceptance coverage over already-landed D.4 surfaces.
Rejected broad product refactors; the only product hardening added was required to make the red acceptance target express the typed contract.

Rejected claiming full embedding-backed semantic near-dup support because ContentReview now has deterministic lexical token-cosine near-dup prefiltering, not ModelRuntime.embed-backed paraphrase detection.
Rejected logging raw prompt, completion, or matched PII in Flight Recorder payloads; the durable event stores only turn_id, pii_kinds, and max severity.

Rejected adding a new DuckDB-backed persistence test in this slice because current operator constraint rejects adding new DuckDB/SQLite-path reliance; the existing DuckDB adapter string mapping was updated only to avoid degrading the new event type to System on readback.
research_basis.selected_approach: Add one focused integration test binary with four subtests, then repair the AC-DISTILL PII audit gap by converting ContentReview PII outcomes into sanitized FlightRecorderEvent records, registering FR-EVT-DISTILL-PII-DETECT, exposing PEFT corpus review outcomes, and keeping raw sensitive text out of durable payloads.
risks: FR-EVT-DISTILL-PII-DETECT now records through the FlightRecorder trait and validates through the registry, but this slice did not add a new DuckDB-specific persistence test because new DuckDB reliance is intentionally avoided.
The near-dup fixture is now a non-exact reordered-completion pair covered by lexical_token_cosine_v1; broader embedding-backed semantic paraphrase detection remains deferred in ContentReview.
RetrievalPolicySurface::snapshot now validates the stored current value, so invalid legacy local state will surface as a typed InvalidProposal error instead of allowing a snapshot.
mitigations: The focused content-review tests assert sanitized event construction, strict payload-key validation, raw-field rejection, and FlightRecorder trait recording with an in-memory recorder.
The existing DuckDB adapter now maps the distill.pii_detected display string back to FlightRecorderEventType::DistillPiiDetected so readback does not collapse the event to System.
The residual semantic near-dup limitation is recorded in repomem and governance for Integration Validator scrutiny rather than hidden by test naming.
Fail-closed retrieval-policy snapshot behavior is covered by both the new acceptance test and existing editable_surface_tests regression target.
validation_plan: Run the dedicated ac_distill_negative_path_tests integration binary.
Run adjacent regressions for ContentReview, PEFT corpus review events, FR registry, corpus extraction, editable surfaces, promotion floor, Goodhart sentinel, and loop scheduler.
Run rustfmt --check, git diff --check, and forbidden SQLite/model-runtime scans on the MT-169 touched file set.

red_absent_target.note: Initial red run failed because Cargo had no test target named ac_distill_negative_path_tests.

red_missing_surfaces.note: After adding the test target and fixtures, the red compile failed on missing FR_EVT_DISTILL_PII_DETECT, missing ContentReview::review_with_events, and missing TrainingTurn Deserialize.

green.note: 4 passed: opt-in default OFF/non-transitive sessions, content-review PII/license/dedup, editable-surface forbidden/policy bounds, and loop safeguards.

red_boilerplate_false_positive_20260524.note: Added adversarial test content_review_different_prompt_same_boilerplate_completion_is_not_near_duplicate; it failed because the initial lexical near-dup branch hard-blocked identical boilerplate completions without checking prompt context.

green_lexical_near_dup_hardening_2026052.note: 7 passed after requiring near-similar prompt context for completion-only near-dup hits; covers non-exact reordered near-dup quarantine, distinct completions on same prompt, and repeated boilerplate completion across different prompts.

red_missing_flight_recorder_pii_event_pa.note: Red compile failed on missing ContentReviewOutcome::flight_recorder_events, ContentReviewOutcome::record_flight_recorder_events, FlightRecorderEventType::DistillPiiDetected, and FrEventId::DistillPiiDetect.

green_sanitized_flight_recorder_pii_even.note: 10 passed; covers sanitized PII FR event construction, strict raw-field rejection, FlightRecorder trait recording path, content-review regressions, and no raw prompt/completion leakage.

green_peft_corpus_review_events_20260524.note: 4 passed; review_corpus_with_events exposes sanitized DistillPiiDetected events while preserving existing verdict summary behavior.

green_fr_event_registry_distill_pii_dete.note: 17 passed; registry includes FR-EVT-DISTILL-PII-DETECT under distillation with turn_id, pii_kinds, and severity schema fields.

out_of_owned_files_pending_operator_revi: src/backend/handshake_core/Cargo.toml (registered ac_distill_negative_path_tests integration binary; file also contains earlier dirty test registrations from the same WP run)

src/backend/handshake_core/src/distillation/content_review.rs (added FR_EVT_DISTILL_PII_DETECT event projection, sanitized FlightRecorderEvent construction/recording, review_with_events wrapper, and deterministic lexical_token_cosine_v1 near-dup prefilter with prompt-context guard)

src/backend/handshake_core/src/distillation/peft_pipeline.rs (added review_corpus_with_events so PEFT corpus review can expose ContentReviewOutcome events without changing the existing review_corpus return signature)
src/backend/handshake_core/src/flight_recorder/duckdb.rs (mapped existing adapter readback string distill.pii_detected to DistillPiiDetected)
src/backend/handshake_core/src/distillation/corpus_extractor.rs (derived Serialize/Deserialize for TrainingTurn so JSON fixtures can load through the real type)
src/backend/handshake_core/src/self_improve/editable_surface.rs (fail-closed snapshot validation for invalid stored retrieval policy values; file is untracked in this worktree from broader WP work)
src/backend/handshake_core/tests/distillation_peft_pipeline_tests.rs (covers PEFT review_corpus_with_events sanitized FR event exposure)
high_roi_additions: The negative-path target now catches the exact bypass classes that happy-path D.4 tests could miss.
PII detection now has a sanitized Flight Recorder event path through the shared FlightRecorder trait plus registry schema, so future adapters do not need to reverse-engineer content-review reasons.
PEFT corpus review can now expose content-review outcomes/events without breaking the existing review_corpus API.
ContentReview now quarantines non-exact reordered near-duplicates without confusing repeated boilerplate completions across different prompts.
TrainingTurn fixture deserialization makes distillation fixture tests cheaper for later no-context models to extend.
Retrieval-policy snapshot validation prevents invalid local policy state from entering a self-improvement proposal flow.

residual_risks: No Integration Validator has reviewed MT-169; READY_FOR_VALIDATION is implementer handoff only.

FR-EVT-DISTILL-PII-DETECT now records through the shared FlightRecorder trait and validates through the registry; no new DuckDB-backed persistence test was added in this slice because new DuckDB reliance is intentionally avoided, though existing readback mapping was updated.
Near-dup coverage now includes deterministic lexical token-cosine detection for non-exact reordered pairs; embedding-backed semantic paraphrase detection remains deferred in ContentReview.
Full handshake_core cargo test --features test-utils exceeded the bounded command timeout in this worktree; focused content-review and AC-DISTILL suites pass with fresh post-cleanup evidence.
Retrieval-policy snapshot now fails closed for invalid stored values, which may expose invalid legacy state earlier than previous behavior.

post_ready_peft_pii_job_binding_20260525.summary: Tauri production startup now creates a writable DuckDB-backed DistillationJobsState under app_data_root/flight_recorder/distillation_jobs.duckdb instead of managing the inert default recorder. handshake_core app dependency now enables app-runtime so duckdb-flight-recorder is available in production app builds.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Recorder initialization can fail at app startup if the app data directory or DuckDB file cannot be created.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Startup now fails loudly with a typed setup error instead of silently using the inert default recorder.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Evidence was produced by Kernel Builder only.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Entry is explicitly marked supporting evidence; Integration Validator status remains PENDING.

post_ready_hardening_20260525.summary: Added a recorder-aware PEFT orchestrator entrypoint, distill_with_flight_recorder, that records sanitized ContentReviewOutcome Flight Recorder events before the zero-pass/no-training abort. Also made the Tauri distillation jobs reader include FR-EVT-DISTILL-PII-DETECT / DistillPiiDetected as an observable distillation error row, so the durable PII event is not hidden from the queue UI when a recorder is attached.

green_tauri_pii_event_observable.note: 1 passed; DistillPiiDetected surfaces as an Error job row with a privacy-preserving message.

residual_risks: The legacy sync distill() API remains compatibility-only and does not itself record Flight Recorder events; production callers that need durable PII telemetry must call distill_with_flight_recorder or an upstream recorder-aware corpus review path.
The PEFT CLI and start_peft_training_job command operate on already-filtered corpus JSONL and still rely on upstream corpus extraction/content review to emit FR-EVT-DISTILL-PII-DETECT.
No Integration Validator has reviewed this post-RFV hardening.

post_ready_peft_pii_job_binding_20260525.summary: Closed the remaining PEFT/content-review audit gap after POSTGRES_TEST_URL work: sanitized DistillPiiDetected Flight Recorder events are now job-bound through the event envelope, PEFT distillation records PII review events before zero-pass aborts, Tauri PEFT start fails closed without an attached recorder, and direct PEFT CLI/Tauri trainer paths no longer bypass content review.
gap_closed: ContentReviewOutcome::flight_recorder_events and record_flight_recorder_events now require job_id and attach it to FlightRecorderEvent.job_id, while keeping PII event payloads raw-text-free and job_id-free.
distill_with_flight_recorder validates a non-empty job_id and records sanitized review events before returning NoPassingTurns.
PEFT CLI reads raw JSONL into TrainingCorpus, reviews it before trainer construction, writes filtered_corpus.jsonl separately, and blocks all-PII corpora before Python/trainer availability checks.

Tauri start_peft_training_job reads and reviews the raw corpus with a recorder-attached job_id, records job-bound PII events before training, trains only the filtered corpus, emits a DistillStudentRun success event, and fails closed if the recorder is not attached.
Tauri distillation job listing keeps DistillPiiDetected visible as an error job row instead of dropping the event.

sources_checked: OpenTelemetry GenAI spans/events semantic conventions: https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/gen-ai/gen-ai-spans/ and https://opentelemetry.io/docs/specs/semconv/gen-ai/gen-ai-events/
research_basis.selected_pattern: Attach operational correlation keys such as job_id to the telemetry envelope, not to sensitive payload text, and store sanitized categorical PII findings only.

proof.result: No whitespace errors; Git emitted LF to CRLF warnings only.

residual_risks: No Integration Validator has reviewed this post-RFV hardening.
Tauri PEFT now fails closed when DistillationJobsState has no recorder attached; app startup wiring must attach the recorder before production PEFT jobs can start.
Mixed corpora still record PII findings and train clean rows; validators should confirm the desired operator-visible severity semantics for partial-review jobs.
The trainer itself remains dependent on the configured Python/PEFT stack; these tests prove the pre-trainer review boundary and job-bound telemetry path, not live LoRA training.

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: ac_distill_negative_path_tests.rs ships 4 negative-path tests covering AC-DISTILL-OPT-IN (default OFF + non-transitive), AC-DISTILL-CONTENT-REVIEW (PII block + license quarantine + dedup), AC-DISTILL-EDITABLE-SURFACE (forbidden surface fails closed + policy bounds), AC-DISTILL-LOOP-SAFEGUARDS (holdout encryption + multi-metric floor + Goodhart + LoopScheduler cap). 4 + adjacent regressions (content_review 10, peft 4-5, fr_event_registry 17, editable_surface 18, promotion_floor 29, goodhart 21, scheduler 40) all green. Substantial post-RFV hardening on FR-EVT-DISTILL-PII-DETECT (sanitized event path + registry + DuckDB readback + PEFT corpus review events + Tauri job listing). HIGH-impact CONCERN: 'non-transitive sessions' test uses two PEER sessions in a flat ledger (peer A, peer B; opt-in A only -> A distilled, B refused). This does NOT test the actual spawn-tree transitivity threat where A is parent of B in a true spawn hierarchy and ledger returns B's pairs as part of A's tree.

Substantial post-RFV hardening on FR-EVT-DISTILL-PII-DETECT (sanitized event path + registry + DuckDB readback + PEFT corpus review events + Tauri job listing).
